other_findings.finding: Differentiated KCs follow two inferred differentiation pathways from basal keratinocytes
One arm expresses high levels of lamellar body-related transcripts
IRF1 and SOX9 are transcription factors differentially expressed in the two pathways
Differentiated KCs co-express genes associated with autosomal recessive congenital ichthyosis including ABCA12, NIPAL4, SLC27A4, TGM1

evidence_quotes.quote: Force-directed graph (FDG) and PAGA analyses reveal dual inferred differentiation trajectories from the stem cell genes (TP63, PPP3CA and CAV1/2)-enriched basal keratinocytes into terminally differentiated keratinocytes expressing CNFN, FLG and IVL
One arm expresses high levels of lamellar body (LB)­related transcripts such as ABCA12, CKAP4 and CLIP1 that characterize late epidermal differentiation
undifferentiated KC (clusters 1, 5), proliferating (cluster 2), differentiated KC (clusters 3, 4, 6, 7), differentiated KC* (cluster 8)
evidence_quotes.source_file: Reynolds et al. 2021 Science, Fig 4D legend
